scripts.install:deps: npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix electron --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.backend:start: python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && python backend/app/main.py
